rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audited each load-bearing claim against the evidence, identifying multiple unsupported assertions and providing detailed corrections.
rationale.RX.1: The agent effectively flagged uncertainties across all problematic claims, ensuring transparency about evidence gaps and suggesting appropriate revisions.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adhered to the scope with only a minor drift in discussing baseline selection wording.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced; the feedback was constructive and safe.
rationale.RX.5: While most changes were well-traced, some minor edits lacked explicit annotation.
